auth.label: API Token
auth.description: MinerU API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Apply for or manage it here: https://mineru.net/apiManage/token

actions.name: create_extract_batch
actions.description: Create a MinerU precise extraction batch from document URLs.

url.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL of one document to parse with MinerU.

is_ocr.description: Whether to enable OCR for this file. Only applies to pipeline and vlm models.

data_id.description: The caller-defined data identifier associated with the source document.

page_ranges.description: The page range expression to parse for this file.

items.description: One URL-based MinerU batch extraction file descriptor.

files.description: The URL-based documents to submit for batch parsing.

enable_formula.description: Whether to enable formula recognition for pipeline and vlm models.

enable_table.description: Whether to enable table recognition for pipeline and vlm models.

language.description: The document language code used by pipeline and vlm models.

items.description: An additional export format requested for the parsed result.

extra_formats.description: Additional result formats to export besides Markdown and JSON.

model_version.description: The MinerU model version to use for parsing.

no_cache.description: Whether MinerU should bypass its URL content cache.

cache_tolerance.description: The acceptable MinerU URL cache age in seconds when no_cache is false.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating a MinerU URL batch extraction task.

batch_id.description: The MinerU batch extraction task identifier.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for creating a MinerU extraction batch.

actions.name: create_extract_task
actions.description: Create a MinerU precise extraction task from a document URL.

url.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL of the document to parse with MinerU.

is_ocr.description: Whether to enable OCR. Only applies to pipeline and vlm models.

enable_formula.description: Whether to enable formula recognition for pipeline and vlm models.

enable_table.description: Whether to enable table recognition for pipeline and vlm models.

language.description: The document language code used by pipeline and vlm models.

data_id.description: The caller-defined data identifier associated with the source document.

items.description: An additional export format requested for the parsed result.

extra_formats.description: Additional result formats to export besides Markdown and JSON.

page_ranges.description: The page range expression to parse, such as 2,4-6 or 2--2.

model_version.description: The MinerU model version to use for parsing.

no_cache.description: Whether MinerU should bypass its URL content cache.

cache_tolerance.description: The acceptable MinerU URL cache age in seconds when no_cache is false.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating a MinerU extraction task from a document URL.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for creating a MinerU extraction task.

actions.name: get_extract_batch_results
actions.description: Get the current status and result URLs for a MinerU extraction batch.

batch_id.description: The MinerU batch extraction task identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for looking up MinerU batch extraction results.

batch_id.description: The MinerU batch extraction task identifier.

file_name.description: The submitted source file name, when returned.

data_id.description: The caller-defined data identifier, when provided.

state.description: The upstream task state, such as waiting-file, pending, running, converting, done, or failed.

full_zip_url.description: The ZIP URL containing Markdown, JSON, and any requested exports.

err_msg.description: The upstream failure reason when the task failed.

extracted_pages.description: The number of pages that have already been parsed.

total_pages.description: The total number of pages reported for the document.

extract_progress.description: The upstream parsing progress details returned while the task is running.

items.description: The normalized MinerU batch extraction item result.

extract_result.description: The extraction results for files in the requested batch.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for MinerU batch extraction results.

actions.name: get_extract_task
actions.description: Get the current status and result URLs for a MinerU extraction task.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for looking up a MinerU extraction task.

data_id.description: The caller-defined data identifier, when provided.

state.description: The upstream task state, such as pending, running, converting, done, or failed.

full_zip_url.description: The ZIP URL containing Markdown, JSON, and any requested exports.

err_msg.description: The upstream failure reason when the task failed.

extracted_pages.description: The number of pages that have already been parsed.

total_pages.description: The total number of pages reported for the document.

extract_progress.description: The upstream parsing progress details returned while the task is running.

outputSchema.description: The normalized MinerU extraction task result.
